authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and 10 trout possession limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: McCumber Reservoir is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so it falls under the general statewide lake regulation in §5.85(a)(1).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (general statewide lake regulation; not listed as a special-regulation water)
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists McCumber Reservoir (Region 1, Shasta Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of 'March-June & October'. This row represents the March-June portion of that non-contiguous window; the October portion is captured in a separate row. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists McCumber Reservoir (Region 1, Shasta Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of 'March-June & October'. This row represents the October portion of that non-contiguous window; the March-June portion is captured in a separate row. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
